TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Chile, title = Chile, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Chile} }

S.FORM: Chile hya' ga cyux maki' tay 30 00 S, 71 00 W na Nan-Meco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 756,102 sq km (maki' tay 38ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 743,812 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 12,290 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 17,650,114. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 21.10% , lhlahuy hya' ga 21.90%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 57%. gwahan zyuwaw na ppila經濟 maki squ 2010 kawas,kwara ka ssquliq nyux mtywaw squ Kooka na Chile qani ga wayal squ 7,580,000 kwara.kawas nqu 2005 ga , 13.2％qani ga wiway kahul squ rngu mtyuwaw squ slaq , 23％hya ga mtyuwaw kung ye ru 63.9％ hya ga ttun naha mtyuwaw. 2013kawas skahun squ lalu musa lmpuw pinhtgan naha mtyuwaw qu qeqaya ga kya wayal squ kahul zik nqu Kokka na ssquliq pinhtgan naha mtywaw wal squ 2,857.03 ok pila nqu Amirika , obih mtnaq ki wayan rima phgci squ Kokka hya la. nanu taqu thyayan naha mbazi ga tntnaq GDP ga wayal hminas squ 20,000 pila na Amirik kinhlagan nqu pqmahan na ga blaq balay spyang naha muhi ga ringgo ru sgnaw ru qitun qinuw tumaw mugi meluh na qinuw bolu qani qu nyux naha pmhyun, cingay balay qu kinbalay naha qu qwaw na sgnaw, maki squ2006 kawas Kokka nqu Chile ga 4,442,877 tun qu kinnyat naha qulih. spyang ggwah pila nqu Kokka nqu Chile ga yuwaw nqu skitang , maki squ 1991kawas , pinposa qeqaya nqu Chile ga 48% hya ga wiway qeqaya na kwang . maki squ cinbwanan qani ga spyang krahu qu kblayan phtuw tong kwang ga Kokka nqu Chile qani tong qani qu paras ppila squ Chile.myan nqu 埃斯孔迪達(Escondida),phtuw kbalay kwara squ cibwanan ga 8% qu kahun squ btunux na kwang kbalay tong. Chile qani ga maki yal nqu 南美洲kwra ka spyang wagiq Kokka ziyuw gwahan na ppila ka linpgan ga (pbkgun squ kwara ka Kokka gq maki te mpiytu) llpgan nqu ini phmut ru ini qaniq pila ,knita kwara ka cibwanan nqu gingkuw ga wagiq qu lmwan naha ppila, spwah squ ruma na pinspngan (yan nqu pinlpgan naha squ squliq) baqun maha wayal rima mhgci qu Kokka naha la 2010 kawas , Chile qani ga maki squ 南美洲te qutux na OECDmaki lahuy na Kokka. Ana maha maki squ 拉美 hiya qu spyang cimyuwaw na Kokka , maki qu ini ptnaq qu kincimuyuwaw nya spyang nqu mzyuwaw,maki squ syakay naha mita squ phyup qani ru gaga nqu mtyuwaw ki pila qqayat nqu bbnkis pinbkuw naha gaga qani ga maki qu hngyang maha aki yugun ma .taqu biru s'yuw squ pila thki na Chile ga nanu m'pila nqu Chile. rrhyal地理 mkura kilux ki mkura tltu kintwahiq maki squ rhyal nqu Chile ga wayal squ 4300kung ri, maki squ rgyax na安第斯 ki baybih bsilung , taqu ht'gan wagi ki tekyopan wagi kintwahiq naha hya ga nanak 200 kung ri( spyang kinglabang nya ga wayal squ 400kung ri ) , squn qani mita qu rhyal na Kokka ga rgzin balay , obih yan nqu qutux qruyux rgzin na rhyal Kokka maki sa kwaraka babaw cinbwanan nanu yasa qu maki qutux sinlluwan lalu na Chile maha "Kokka na patay". kwara ka rhyal nqu Chile qani mosa cyugal qu qinsugal : cingay qu rrhyax maki sa mkura tltu, cingay qu wagiq na b'bu rgyax wayal hminas sa 6000 mi. maki squ rgyax na安第斯sazing qu rgyax te kska naha ga bbnaqi阿他加馬 maki babaw rhyal qani ga spyang mtkyay qu rhyal qani , yalaw gi nyux 'mukan na副熱帶高壓, qutux qutux cinsuqan kawas ga ungat qu qalax nya.s'wayal ga min kbalay squ 硝酸kwang ru pposa tbziran, misuw qani lga spyang kbalay squ tong kwang. taqu rhyal qani spyang krahu na kinkina naha hya ga 安托法加斯塔(219,000 ssquliq ka nyux maki sqani)ki伊基, kayal nqu te k'ska hya ga myal nqu kayal na kska bsilung. kayal nqu rhyal te k'ska hya ga msyam balay ,cingay balay qu squliq nya . spyang nqu ki'an naha ka qalang ga 聖地牙哥(kya wayal squ 650squliq nya )anu nyux maki squani.iyat nanak qani maki uzi qu瓦爾帕萊索(gwahan ru hngawan nqu qasu,280,000 squliq nyux maki sqani)ki康塞普西翁(pslyan kska zyuwaw nqu mtyuwaw ki tmslaq,350,000 squliq nyux maki sqani)hminas spyang na ki'an sinkina. te mkura kilux hya ga cikuy cikay qu squliq nya, qlwaxan iyan , krahu qu behuy ru lwakah msbisuw . tegling kintan nqu bsilung ga cingay qu 島嶼ki峽灣 krahu nqu rhyal kura squ mkura kilux hya ga maki qu火地島 Chile ki 阿根廷pinsmka naha, te gleng na火地島 ga maki qutux 島 babaw na 島 qani ga 合恩角squn naha qani hya ga spyang mkura kilux Chile ki 南美洲. rhyal nqu mkura tltu puqing qsya ki puqing qsya te mkura kilux, iyat nanak spyang blaq qu rahyl kahul squ mtlaka sinqunan na tlak m'krahu qu qutux na rhyal . taring squ tekyopan wagi msa ht'gan wagi minaring hga qutux nqu rgzin na kinta'n bslung , ru m'rgyax la , babaw lga wayal wagiq glabang qu rhyal la. maki squ rhyal na kska qani hya ga msyam balay qu wagi rhyal nya, baqun tmbul ru qmayat squ qqyatan. Chile ki玻利維亞ru saysaw na 阿根廷hya ga rgyax na 安第斯 mkura turu ryax nqu ht'gan wagi. iyat nanak qni kska na Taypinyang 胡安·費爾南德斯群島ki復活節島naha naqi ga rhyal na Chile uzi. pspngun qutux qutux kawas qu qinlwaxan nya maki squ Chile mkura tltu na安托法加斯塔 ga wal squ 12.7 haw mi,maki 聖地牙哥hya ga wayl squ 375haw mi,maki squ mkura kilux rhyal nqu火地島hya ga wayal squ 5800haw mi. ssquliq nya人口 maki squ 2012 kawas gmuywaw hmkang maqut ssquilq na Chile ga 16,341,929 kwara qu squliq naha .yalawgi 1990 kawqs naha qasa ga pinlqyan naha laqi ga wayal mbyaq , squliq na Chile ga wal si 'byaq , rima naha lpgun 2050 kawas mwasa tehuk squ 2,020 mang , ru mmosa mhtuw squ ptwang squliq . Kokka na Chile hya ga cinga qu minrok naha , wiwan maha squliq na Kokka naha ga kahul squ cingay nqu ini ptnaq kinbahan Kokka ru squliq na 印第安,kwara ka squlq 'nimaw naha squ ini ptnaq na Kokka.maki squ Chile,59％ na squliq naha maha sami hya ga kibahan sami nqu pelquwi na 歐洲,25％ nqu suliq hya ga kmal maha sami ga squliq na 麥士蒂索 ma(kinbahan nqu squliq na pelquwi歐洲ki squliq na印第安 mbbiq laqi kneril lga yasa qu immaw qu ramu naha la) ,thay nya lga kinbahan nqu squliq ka mqalux非洲,squliq na 印第安ru binah na minrok la .squliq ka pelquwi nqu Chile spyang kahul squ kinbahan kinhang an西班牙(pyang squliq na西班牙,安達盧西亞ki squliq na巴斯克),maki uzi qu kahul squ ka kwara kahul binah na Kokka mwah maki te智利qani,maki uzi qu kahul squ minrok na 歐洲zik qani ga wayal mimaw ramu ki kahul squ中東te huk squ Chile squliq kinbahan na阿拉伯.Squliq Kinbahan nqu 非洲hya ga si kyasa cikuy,kya wayl squ squ 1.5% qu squliq na Chile.Piraiyan na kawas,Kokka nqu Chile swalan nya qu kahul squ pelquwi ,日本,台灣,韓國squliq ka tnwang.skahu squ 2011 kawas gmuzywaw maqut squ ssquliq,squliq nqu Chile kyawayal squ 8％ kmayal maha sami hya ga ''tayal sqani ma. 70%na ssquliq ga snhi squ Teskyo,15% ssquliq ga snihi squ 新教,3.3% ssquliq ga snihi squ摩門教,1% ssquliq ga snihi squ耶和華見證人,8.3% ssquliq ga ini snihi. Chileqani ga baq kmal ke na西班牙(ana ga ke na 西班牙maki sqani ga yal nqu qutux na mnanak blaq la,yal nqu "Chile"lga lpgun naha lgayal qani la ('ʃiːle)).Ke nqu馬普切,ke na maki squ mkura kilux玻利維亞克丘亞,ke na艾馬拉,ke na 拉帕努伊hya ga ke na ''tayal sqani.maki squ rhyal na mkura kilux Chile qinsugan naha,maki uzi qu kmal ke na德語. pinsrngyan外交 pinglgan na Chile ki 馬來西亞ga kahul squ ggwhan nqu pinbziran.maki squ 2009 kawas,pila ka pintbziran na Chile ki馬來西亞kya wayal squ 3.36 ok pila na Amirika,taqu 馬來西亞pnosa nya pila squ Chile ga wayal squ 1680mang pila nqu Amirika,pila ka mwah myut hya ga wayal squ1.487ok pila na Amirika. gaga文化 gaga nqu Chile ga squnun naha ki tnwang squ cinpuqing nqu歐洲,msqun gaga squliq na印第安,pchup squ innaras na北美,nanu yasa qu gaga na Chile ungat spngan kinblaq gaga nya maki squ babaw cibwanan qani,kruma ga obih yal mtnnnaq ktan. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Santiago. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 18 na tay mqiru' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Michelle Bachelet, aring ryax 11 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部

Chile hya' ga cyux maki' tay 30 00 S, 71 00 W na Nan-Meco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 756,102 sq km (maki' tay 38ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 743,812 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 12,290 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 17,650,114. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 21.10% , lhlahuy hya' ga 21.90%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 57%. gwahan zyuwaw na ppila經濟 maki squ 2010 kawas,kwara ka ssquliq nyux mtywaw squ Kooka na Chile qani ga wayal squ 7,580,000 kwara.kawas nqu 2005 ga , 13.2％qani ga wiway kahul squ rngu mtyuwaw squ slaq , 23％hya ga mtyuwaw kung ye ru 63.9％ hya ga ttun naha mtyuwaw. 2013kawas skahun squ lalu musa lmpuw pinhtgan naha mtyuwaw qu qeqaya ga kya wayal squ kahul zik nqu Kokka na ssquliq pinhtgan naha mtywaw wal squ 2,857.03 ok pila nqu Amirika , obih mtnaq ki wayan rima phgci squ Kokka hya la. nanu taqu thyayan naha mbazi ga tntnaq GDP ga wayal hminas squ 20,000 pila na Amirik kinhlagan nqu pqmahan na ga blaq balay spyang naha muhi ga ringgo ru sgnaw ru qitun qinuw tumaw mugi meluh na qinuw bolu qani qu nyux naha pmhyun, cingay balay qu kinbalay naha qu qwaw na sgnaw, maki squ2006 kawas Kokka nqu Chile ga 4,442,877 tun qu kinnyat naha qulih. spyang ggwah pila nqu Kokka nqu Chile ga yuwaw nqu skitang , maki squ 1991kawas , pinposa qeqaya nqu Chile ga 48% hya ga wiway qeqaya na kwang . maki squ cinbwanan qani ga spyang krahu qu kblayan phtuw tong kwang ga Kokka nqu Chile qani tong qani qu paras ppila squ Chile.myan nqu 埃斯孔迪達(Escondida),phtuw kbalay kwara squ cibwanan ga 8% qu kahun squ btunux na kwang kbalay tong. Chile qani ga maki yal nqu 南美洲kwra ka spyang wagiq Kokka ziyuw gwahan na ppila ka linpgan ga (pbkgun squ kwara ka Kokka gq maki te mpiytu) llpgan nqu ini phmut ru ini qaniq pila ,knita kwara ka cibwanan nqu gingkuw ga wagiq qu lmwan naha ppila, spwah squ ruma na pinspngan (yan nqu pinlpgan naha squ squliq) baqun maha wayal rima mhgci qu Kokka naha la 2010 kawas , Chile qani ga maki squ 南美洲te qutux na OECDmaki lahuy na Kokka. Ana maha maki squ 拉美 hiya qu spyang cimyuwaw na Kokka , maki qu ini ptnaq qu kincimuyuwaw nya spyang nqu mzyuwaw,maki squ syakay naha mita squ phyup qani ru gaga nqu mtyuwaw ki pila qqayat nqu bbnkis pinbkuw naha gaga qani ga maki qu hngyang maha aki yugun ma .taqu biru s'yuw squ pila thki na Chile ga nanu m'pila nqu Chile. rrhyal地理 mkura kilux ki mkura tltu kintwahiq maki squ rhyal nqu Chile ga wayal squ 4300kung ri, maki squ rgyax na安第斯 ki baybih bsilung , taqu ht'gan wagi ki tekyopan wagi kintwahiq naha hya ga nanak 200 kung ri( spyang kinglabang nya ga wayal squ 400kung ri ) , squn qani mita qu rhyal na Kokka ga rgzin balay , obih yan nqu qutux qruyux rgzin na rhyal Kokka maki sa kwaraka babaw cinbwanan nanu yasa qu maki qutux sinlluwan lalu na Chile maha "Kokka na patay". kwara ka rhyal nqu Chile qani mosa cyugal qu qinsugal : cingay qu rrhyax maki sa mkura tltu, cingay qu wagiq na b'bu rgyax wayal hminas sa 6000 mi. maki squ rgyax na安第斯sazing qu rgyax te kska naha ga bbnaqi阿他加馬 maki babaw rhyal qani ga spyang mtkyay qu rhyal qani , yalaw gi nyux 'mukan na副熱帶高壓, qutux qutux cinsuqan kawas ga ungat qu qalax nya.s'wayal ga min kbalay squ 硝酸kwang ru pposa tbziran, misuw qani lga spyang kbalay squ tong kwang. taqu rhyal qani spyang krahu na kinkina naha hya ga 安托法加斯塔(219,000 ssquliq ka nyux maki sqani)ki伊基, kayal nqu te k'ska hya ga myal nqu kayal na kska bsilung. kayal nqu rhyal te k'ska hya ga msyam balay ,cingay balay qu squliq nya . spyang nqu ki'an naha ka qalang ga 聖地牙哥(kya wayal squ 650squliq nya )anu nyux maki squani.iyat nanak qani maki uzi qu瓦爾帕萊索(gwahan ru hngawan nqu qasu,280,000 squliq nyux maki sqani)ki康塞普西翁(pslyan kska zyuwaw nqu mtyuwaw ki tmslaq,350,000 squliq nyux maki sqani)hminas spyang na ki'an sinkina. te mkura kilux hya ga cikuy cikay qu squliq nya, qlwaxan iyan , krahu qu behuy ru lwakah msbisuw . tegling kintan nqu bsilung ga cingay qu 島嶼ki峽灣 krahu nqu rhyal kura squ mkura kilux hya ga maki qu火地島 Chile ki 阿根廷pinsmka naha, te gleng na火地島 ga maki qutux 島 babaw na 島 qani ga 合恩角squn naha qani hya ga spyang mkura kilux Chile ki 南美洲. rhyal nqu mkura tltu puqing qsya ki puqing qsya te mkura kilux, iyat nanak spyang blaq qu rahyl kahul squ mtlaka sinqunan na tlak m'krahu qu qutux na rhyal . taring squ tekyopan wagi msa ht'gan wagi minaring hga qutux nqu rgzin na kinta'n bslung , ru m'rgyax la , babaw lga wayal wagiq glabang qu rhyal la. maki squ rhyal na kska qani hya ga msyam balay qu wagi rhyal nya, baqun tmbul ru qmayat squ qqyatan. Chile ki玻利維亞ru saysaw na 阿根廷hya ga rgyax na 安第斯 mkura turu ryax nqu ht'gan wagi. iyat nanak qni kska na Taypinyang 胡安·費爾南德斯群島ki復活節島naha naqi ga rhyal na Chile uzi. pspngun qutux qutux kawas qu qinlwaxan nya maki squ Chile mkura tltu na安托法加斯塔 ga wal squ 12.7 haw mi,maki 聖地牙哥hya ga wayl squ 375haw mi,maki squ mkura kilux rhyal nqu火地島hya ga wayal squ 5800haw mi. ssquliq nya人口 maki squ 2012 kawas gmuywaw hmkang maqut ssquilq na Chile ga 16,341,929 kwara qu squliq naha .yalawgi 1990 kawqs naha qasa ga pinlqyan naha laqi ga wayal mbyaq , squliq na Chile ga wal si 'byaq , rima naha lpgun 2050 kawas mwasa tehuk squ 2,020 mang , ru mmosa mhtuw squ ptwang squliq . Kokka na Chile hya ga cinga qu minrok naha , wiwan maha squliq na Kokka naha ga kahul squ cingay nqu ini ptnaq kinbahan Kokka ru squliq na 印第安,kwara ka squlq 'nimaw naha squ ini ptnaq na Kokka.maki squ Chile,59％ na squliq naha maha sami hya ga kibahan sami nqu pelquwi na 歐洲,25％ nqu suliq hya ga kmal maha sami ga squliq na 麥士蒂索 ma(kinbahan nqu squliq na pelquwi歐洲ki squliq na印第安 mbbiq laqi kneril lga yasa qu immaw qu ramu naha la) ,thay nya lga kinbahan nqu squliq ka mqalux非洲,squliq na 印第安ru binah na minrok la .squliq ka pelquwi nqu Chile spyang kahul squ kinbahan kinhang an西班牙(pyang squliq na西班牙,安達盧西亞ki squliq na巴斯克),maki uzi qu kahul squ ka kwara kahul binah na Kokka mwah maki te智利qani,maki uzi qu kahul squ minrok na 歐洲zik qani ga wayal mimaw ramu ki kahul squ中東te huk squ Chile squliq kinbahan na阿拉伯.Squliq Kinbahan nqu 非洲hya ga si kyasa cikuy,kya wayl squ squ 1.5% qu squliq na Chile.Piraiyan na kawas,Kokka nqu Chile swalan nya qu kahul squ pelquwi ,日本,台灣,韓國squliq ka tnwang.skahu squ 2011 kawas gmuzywaw maqut squ ssquliq,squliq nqu Chile kyawayal squ 8％ kmayal maha sami hya ga ''tayal sqani ma. 70%na ssquliq ga snhi squ Teskyo,15% ssquliq ga snihi squ 新教,3.3% ssquliq ga snihi squ摩門教,1% ssquliq ga snihi squ耶和華見證人,8.3% ssquliq ga ini snihi. Chileqani ga baq kmal ke na西班牙(ana ga ke na 西班牙maki sqani ga yal nqu qutux na mnanak blaq la,yal nqu "Chile"lga lpgun naha lgayal qani la ('ʃiːle)).Ke nqu馬普切,ke na maki squ mkura kilux玻利維亞克丘亞,ke na艾馬拉,ke na 拉帕努伊hya ga ke na ''tayal sqani.maki squ rhyal na mkura kilux Chile qinsugan naha,maki uzi qu kmal ke na德語. pinsrngyan外交 pinglgan na Chile ki 馬來西亞ga kahul squ ggwhan nqu pinbziran.maki squ 2009 kawas,pila ka pintbziran na Chile ki馬來西亞kya wayal squ 3.36 ok pila na Amirika,taqu 馬來西亞pnosa nya pila squ Chile ga wayal squ 1680mang pila nqu Amirika,pila ka mwah myut hya ga wayal squ1.487ok pila na Amirika. gaga文化 gaga nqu Chile ga squnun naha ki tnwang squ cinpuqing nqu歐洲,msqun gaga squliq na印第安,pchup squ innaras na北美,nanu yasa qu gaga na Chile ungat spngan kinblaq gaga nya maki squ babaw cibwanan qani,kruma ga obih yal mtnnnaq ktan. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Santiago. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 18 na tay mqiru' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Michelle Bachelet, aring ryax 11 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨħile ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** s~ɕ, ** ** w na nan-meʦ~ʨo s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ ***,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj **ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa ***,*** s~ɕq km , kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa **,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa **,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa **.**% , lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **%. ɣwaħan zjuwaw na ppila** maki s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ,kwara ka s~ɕs~ɕquliq njux mtjwaw s~ɕqu kooka na ʦ~ʨħile qani ɣa wajal s~ɕqu *,***,*** kwara.kawas~ɕ nqu **** ɣa , **.**qani ɣa wiwaj kaħul s~ɕqu rŋu mtjuwaw s~ɕqu s~ɕlaq , ***ħja ɣa mtjuwaw kuŋ je ru **.** ħja ɣa ttun naħa mtjuwaw. ****kawas~ɕ s~ɕkaħun s~ɕqu lalu mus~ɕa lmpuw pinħtɣan naħa mtjuwaw qu qeqaja ɣa kja wajal s~ɕqu kaħul zik nqu kokka na s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinħtɣan naħa mtjwaw wal s~ɕqu *,***.** ok pila nqu amirika , oβiħ mtnaq ki wajan rima pħɣʦ~ʨi s~ɕqu kokka ħja la. nanu taqu tħjajan naħa mβazi ɣa tntnaq ɣ*p ɣa wajal ħminas~ɕ s~ɕqu **,*** pila na amirik kinħlaɣan nqu pqmaħan na ɣa βlaq βalaj s~ɕpjaŋ naħa muħi ɣa riŋɣo ru s~ɕɣnaw ru qitun qinuw tumaw muɣi meluħ na qinuw βolu qani qu njux naħa pmħjun, ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj qu kinβalaj naħa qu qwaw na s~ɕɣnaw, maki s~ɕqu**** kawas~ɕ kokka nqu ʦ~ʨħile ɣa *,***,*** tun qu kinnjat naħa quliħ. s~ɕpjaŋ ɣɣwaħ pila nqu kokka nqu ʦ~ʨħile ɣa juwaw nqu s~ɕkitaŋ , maki s~ɕqu ****kawas~ɕ , pinpos~ɕa qeqaja nqu ʦ~ʨħile ɣa **% ħja ɣa wiwaj qeqaja na kwaŋ . maki s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨinβwanan qani ɣa s~ɕpjaŋ kraħu qu kβlajan pħtuw toŋ kwaŋ ɣa kokka nqu ʦ~ʨħile qani toŋ qani qu paras~ɕ ppila s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨħile.mjan nqu *****(es~ɕʦ~ʨon*i*a),pħtuw kβalaj kwara s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨiβwanan ɣa *% qu kaħun s~ɕqu βtunux na kwaŋ kβalaj toŋ. ʦ~ʨħile qani ɣa maki jal nqu ***kwra ka s~ɕpjaŋ waɣiq kokka zijuw ɣwaħan na ppila ka linpɣan ɣa (pβkɣun s~ɕqu kwara ka kokka ɣq maki te mpijtu) llpɣan nqu ini pħmut ru ini qaniq pila ,knita kwara ka ʦ~ʨiβwanan nqu ɣiŋkuw ɣa waɣiq qu lmwan naħa ppila, s~ɕpwaħ s~ɕqu ruma na pins~ɕpŋan (jan nqu pinlpɣan naħa s~ɕqu s~ɕquliq) βaqun maħa wajal rima mħɣʦ~ʨi qu kokka naħa la **** kawas~ɕ , ʦ~ʨħile qani ɣa maki s~ɕqu ***te qutux na oeʦ~ʨ*maki laħuj na kokka. ana maħa maki s~ɕqu ** ħija qu s~ɕpjaŋ ʦ~ʨimjuwaw na kokka , maki qu ini ptnaq qu kinʦ~ʨimujuwaw nja s~ɕpjaŋ nqu mzjuwaw,maki s~ɕqu s~ɕjakaj naħa mita s~ɕqu pħjup qani ru ɣaɣa nqu mtjuwaw ki pila qqajat nqu ββnkis~ɕ pinβkuw naħa ɣaɣa qani ɣa maki qu ħŋjaŋ maħa aki juɣun ma .taqu βiru s~ɕʔjuw s~ɕqu pila tħki na ʦ~ʨħile ɣa nanu mʔpila nqu ʦ~ʨħile. rrħjal** mkura kilux ki mkura tltu kintwaħiq maki s~ɕqu rħjal nqu ʦ~ʨħile ɣa wajal s~ɕqu ****kuŋ ri, maki s~ɕqu rɣjax na*** ki βajβiħ βs~ɕiluŋ , taqu ħtʔɣan waɣi ki tekjopan waɣi kintwaħiq naħa ħja ɣa nanak *** kuŋ ri( s~ɕpjaŋ kiŋlaβaŋ nja ɣa wajal s~ɕqu ***kuŋ ri ) , s~ɕqun qani mita qu rħjal na kokka ɣa rɣzin βalaj , oβiħ jan nqu qutux qrujux rɣzin na rħjal kokka maki s~ɕa kwaraka βaβaw ʦ~ʨinβwanan nanu jas~ɕa qu maki qutux s~ɕinlluwan lalu na ʦ~ʨħile maħa "kokka na pataj". kwara ka rħjal nqu ʦ~ʨħile qani mos~ɕa ʦ~ʨjuɣal qu qins~ɕuɣal : ʦ~ʨiŋaj qu rrħjax maki s~ɕa mkura tltu, ʦ~ʨiŋaj qu waɣiq na βʔβu rɣjax wajal ħminas~ɕ s~ɕa **** mi. maki s~ɕqu rɣjax na***s~ɕaziŋ qu rɣjax te ks~ɕka naħa ɣa ββnaqi**** maki βaβaw rħjal qani ɣa s~ɕpjaŋ mtkjaj qu rħjal qani , jalaw ɣi njux ʔmukan na*****, qutux qutux ʦ~ʨins~ɕuqan kawas~ɕ ɣa uŋat qu qalax nja.s~ɕʔwajal ɣa min kβalaj s~ɕqu **kwaŋ ru ppos~ɕa tβziran, mis~ɕuw qani lɣa s~ɕpjaŋ kβalaj s~ɕqu toŋ kwaŋ. taqu rħjal qani s~ɕpjaŋ kraħu na kinkina naħa ħja ɣa ******(***,*** s~ɕs~ɕquliq ka njux maki s~ɕqani)ki**, kajal nqu te kʔs~ɕka ħja ɣa mjal nqu kajal na ks~ɕka βs~ɕiluŋ. kajal nqu rħjal te kʔs~ɕka ħja ɣa ms~ɕjam βalaj ,ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj qu s~ɕquliq nja . s~ɕpjaŋ nqu kiʔan naħa ka qalaŋ ɣa ****(kja wajal s~ɕqu ***s~ɕquliq nja )anu njux maki s~ɕquani.ijat nanak qani maki uzi qu*****(ɣwaħan ru ħŋawan nqu qas~ɕu,***,*** s~ɕquliq njux maki s~ɕqani)ki*****(ps~ɕljan ks~ɕka zjuwaw nqu mtjuwaw ki tms~ɕlaq,***,*** s~ɕquliq njux maki s~ɕqani)ħminas~ɕ s~ɕpjaŋ na kiʔan s~ɕinkina. te mkura kilux ħja ɣa ʦ~ʨikuj ʦ~ʨikaj qu s~ɕquliq nja, qlwaxan ijan , kraħu qu βeħuj ru lwakaħ ms~ɕβis~ɕuw . teɣliŋ kintan nqu βs~ɕiluŋ ɣa ʦ~ʨiŋaj qu **ki** kraħu nqu rħjal kura s~ɕqu mkura kilux ħja ɣa maki qu*** ʦ~ʨħile ki ***pins~ɕmka naħa, te ɣleŋ na*** ɣa maki qutux * βaβaw na * qani ɣa ***s~ɕqun naħa qani ħja ɣa s~ɕpjaŋ mkura kilux ʦ~ʨħile ki ***. rħjal nqu mkura tltu puqiŋ qs~ɕja ki puqiŋ qs~ɕja te mkura kilux, ijat nanak s~ɕpjaŋ βlaq qu raħjl kaħul s~ɕqu mtlaka s~ɕinqunan na tlak mʔkraħu qu qutux na rħjal . tariŋ s~ɕqu tekjopan waɣi ms~ɕa ħtʔɣan waɣi minariŋ ħɣa qutux nqu rɣzin na kintaʔn βs~ɕluŋ , ru mʔrɣjax la , βaβaw lɣa wajal waɣiq ɣlaβaŋ qu rħjal la. maki s~ɕqu rħjal na ks~ɕka qani ħja ɣa ms~ɕjam βalaj qu waɣi rħjal nja, βaqun tmβul ru qmajat s~ɕqu qqjatan. ʦ~ʨħile ki****ru s~ɕajs~ɕaw na ***ħja ɣa rɣjax na *** mkura turu rjax nqu ħtʔɣan waɣi. ijat nanak qni ks~ɕka na tajpinjaŋ **********ki****naħa naqi ɣa rħjal na ʦ~ʨħile uzi. ps~ɕpŋun qutux qutux kawas~ɕ qu qinlwaxan nja maki s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨħile mkura tltu na****** ɣa wal s~ɕqu **.* ħaw mi,maki ****ħja ɣa wajl s~ɕqu ***ħaw mi,maki s~ɕqu mkura kilux rħjal nqu***ħja ɣa wajal s~ɕqu ****ħaw mi. s~ɕs~ɕquliq nja** maki s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ ɣmujwaw ħmkaŋ maqut s~ɕs~ɕquilq na ʦ~ʨħile ɣa **,***,*** kwara qu s~ɕquliq naħa .jalawɣi **** kawqs~ɕ naħa qas~ɕa ɣa pinlqjan naħa laqi ɣa wajal mβjaq , s~ɕquliq na ʦ~ʨħile ɣa wal s~ɕi ʔβjaq , rima naħa lpɣun **** kawas~ɕ mwas~ɕa teħuk s~ɕqu *,*** maŋ , ru mmos~ɕa mħtuw s~ɕqu ptwaŋ s~ɕquliq . kokka na ʦ~ʨħile ħja ɣa ʦ~ʨiŋa qu minrok naħa , wiwan maħa s~ɕquliq na kokka naħa ɣa kaħul s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨiŋaj nqu ini ptnaq kinβaħan kokka ru s~ɕquliq na ***,kwara ka s~ɕqulq ʔnimaw naħa s~ɕqu ini ptnaq na kokka.maki s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨħile,*** na s~ɕquliq naħa maħa s~ɕami ħja ɣa kiβaħan s~ɕami nqu pelquwi na **,*** nqu s~ɕuliq ħja ɣa kmal maħa s~ɕami ɣa s~ɕquliq na **** ma(kinβaħan nqu s~ɕquliq na pelquwi**ki s~ɕquliq na*** mββiq laqi kneril lɣa jas~ɕa qu immaw qu ramu naħa la) ,tħaj nja lɣa kinβaħan nqu s~ɕquliq ka mqalux**,s~ɕquliq na ***ru βinaħ na minrok la .s~ɕquliq ka pelquwi nqu ʦ~ʨħile s~ɕpjaŋ kaħul s~ɕqu kinβaħan kinħaŋ an***(pjaŋ s~ɕquliq na***,*****ki s~ɕquliq na***),maki uzi qu kaħul s~ɕqu ka kwara kaħul βinaħ na kokka mwaħ maki te**qani,maki uzi qu kaħul s~ɕqu minrok na **zik qani ɣa wajal mimaw ramu ki kaħul s~ɕqu**te ħuk s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨħile s~ɕquliq kinβaħan na***.s~ɕquliq kinβaħan nqu **ħja ɣa s~ɕi kjas~ɕa ʦ~ʨikuj,kja wajl s~ɕqu s~ɕqu *.*% qu s~ɕquliq na ʦ~ʨħile.piraijan na kawas~ɕ,kokka nqu ʦ~ʨħile s~ɕwalan nja qu kaħul s~ɕqu pelquwi ,**,**,**s~ɕquliq ka tnwaŋ.s~ɕkaħu s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ ɣmuzjwaw maqut s~ɕqu s~ɕs~ɕquliq,s~ɕquliq nqu ʦ~ʨħile kjawajal s~ɕqu ** kmajal maħa s~ɕami ħja ɣa ʔʔtajal s~ɕqani ma. **%na s~ɕs~ɕquliq ɣa s~ɕnħi s~ɕqu tes~ɕkjo,**% s~ɕs~ɕquliq ɣa s~ɕniħi s~ɕqu **,*.*% s~ɕs~ɕquliq ɣa s~ɕniħi s~ɕqu***,*% s~ɕs~ɕquliq ɣa s~ɕniħi s~ɕqu******,*.*% s~ɕs~ɕquliq ɣa ini s~ɕniħi. ʦ~ʨħileqani ɣa βaq kmal ke na***(ana ɣa ke na ***maki s~ɕqani ɣa jal nqu qutux na mnanak βlaq la,jal nqu "ʦ~ʨħile"lɣa lpɣun naħa lɣajal qani la (ʔ*i*le)).ke nqu***,ke na maki s~ɕqu mkura kilux*******,ke na***,ke na ****ħja ɣa ke na ʔʔtajal s~ɕqani.maki s~ɕqu rħjal na mkura kilux ʦ~ʨħile qins~ɕuɣan naħa,maki uzi qu kmal ke na**. pins~ɕrŋjan** piŋlɣan na ʦ~ʨħile ki ****ɣa kaħul s~ɕqu ɣɣwħan nqu pinβziran.maki s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ,pila ka pintβziran na ʦ~ʨħile ki****kja wajal s~ɕqu *.** ok pila na amirika,taqu ****pnos~ɕa nja pila s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨħile ɣa wajal s~ɕqu ****maŋ pila nqu amirika,pila ka mwaħ mjut ħja ɣa wajal s~ɕqu*.***ok pila na amirika. ɣaɣa** ɣaɣa nqu ʦ~ʨħile ɣa s~ɕqunun naħa ki tnwaŋ s~ɕqu ʦ~ʨinpuqiŋ nqu**,ms~ɕqun ɣaɣa s~ɕquliq na***,pʦ~ʨħup s~ɕqu innaras~ɕ na**,nanu jas~ɕa qu ɣaɣa na ʦ~ʨħile uŋat s~ɕpŋan kinβlaq ɣaɣa nja maki s~ɕqu βaβaw ʦ~ʨiβwanan qani,kruma ɣa oβiħ jal mtnnnaq ktan. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕantiaɣo. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa ** na taj mqiruʔ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa miʦ~ʨħelle βaʦ~ʨħelet, ariŋ rjax ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
